userStories.subject: User Authentication & BYOK
acceptanceCriteria: Login/Signup screens functional with Supabase Auth
Dashboard requires a user-provided API key to run audits
agent.py refactored to accept dynamic API keys

userStories.subject: Data Persistence (Brands & Audits)
acceptanceCriteria: Audits are saved to Supabase 'audits' table upon completion
Dashboard displays audit history for the logged-in user
Brands are tracked per user in Supabase 'brands' table

userStories.subject: Settings & Stats
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page allows updating API key
Usage stats (number of audits) visible to user
